tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Shake It Off by Taylor Swift
Album: 1989
Track 6
2014


Standard Tuning
No Capo


Chords:

Am:      x02210
C:       x32010
G:       320003 or 320033

(If you prefer you can put a capo on the 5th fret and replace the chords above by Em, G and D)


 Verse:
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
 I stay out too late[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
 Got nothing in my brain[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
 That's what people say, mmm[/tab]

 That's what people say, mmm
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
 I go on too many dates[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
 But I can't make them stay[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]G[/ch]
 At least that's what people say, mmm[/tab]

 That's what people say, mmm


 Pre-Chorus:
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
 But I keep cruising[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
 Can't stop, won't stop moving[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]G[/ch]
 It's like I got this music[/tab]
                     
 In my mind, saying it's gonna be alright


 Chorus:
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
 Cause the players gonna play, play, play, play, play[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
 And the haters gonna hate, hate, hate, hate, hate[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
 Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

 Shake it off, shake it off
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
 Heartbreakers gonna break, break, break, break, break[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
 And the fakers gonna fake, fake, fake, fake[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
 Baby I'm just gonna shake, shake, shake, shake, shake[/tab]

 Shake it off, shake it off


 Verse:
[tab]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
 I never miss a beat[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
 I'm lightning on my feet[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch]
 And that's what they don't see, mmm[/tab]

 That's what they don't see, mmm
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
 I'm dancing on my own[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C[/ch]
 I make the moves up as I go[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]
 And that's what they don't know, mmm[/tab]

 That's what they don't know, mmm

 Yeah!
